history.en: While the Turkish Van loves to jump and climb, play with toys, retrieve and play chase, she is is big and ungainly; this is one cat who doesn’t always land on his feet. While not much of a lap cat, the Van will be happy to cuddle next to you and sleep in your bed.
history.zh: 土耳其梵猫喜欢跳跃和攀爬、玩玩具、捡东西和追逐游戏，但它体型大且笨拙；这是一只不总能四脚着地的猫。虽然不太喜欢做膝上猫，但梵猫很乐意依偎在你身边，睡在你的床上。

overview.en: The Turkish Van is a rare and ancient breed originating from the Lake Van region of Turkey. Known for its agile, intelligent, and loyal nature, this cat is playful and energetic, often displaying a dog-like enthusiasm for fetch and chase games. Despite its athleticism, the Van is surprisingly ungainly and does not always land on its feet. It is not a typical lap cat but enjoys close companionship, often cuddling beside you or sleeping in your bed. Its semi-long, water-resistant coat—most famously in white with colored markings on the head and tail—requires moderate grooming. The breed is curious, social, and thrives on interactive play, making it a delightful yet independent companion.
overview.zh: 土耳其梵猫是一种源自土耳其凡湖地区的古老稀有猫种。它们性格敏捷、聪明且忠诚，充满活力和玩心，喜欢玩追逐和衔回游戏，甚至像狗一样热情。尽管运动能力强，但梵猫有时显得笨拙，并不总能四脚落地。它们不太喜欢待在主人腿上，但乐于依偎在你身边或睡在你的床上。其半长、防水的被毛以白色为主，头部和尾巴带有彩色斑纹，需要适度梳理。梵猫好奇、社交，喜欢互动游戏，是一种迷人而独立的伴侣。

care.en: Daily care for a Turkish Van includes a balanced routine of grooming, exercise, and health checks. Their semi-long coat is water-resistant and sheds moderately; brush 2–3 times per week to reduce loose hair and prevent mats, increasing to daily during seasonal shedding. These cats are highly energetic and need at least 30–60 minutes of active play daily—interactive toys, puzzle feeders, and climbing trees are ideal. They enjoy water, so a shallow fountain or supervised bath can be enriching. Regular nail trimming, ear cleaning, and dental hygiene are essential. Annual veterinary visits for vaccinations, parasite control, and health screenings help ensure a long, healthy life (12–17 years).
care.zh: 土耳其梵猫的日常护理包括均衡的梳理、运动和健康检查。其半长防水被毛脱落量适中，每周刷毛2–3次可减少浮毛并防止打结，换毛季需每日梳理。梵猫精力旺盛，每天至少需要30–60分钟的活跃游戏——互动玩具、益智喂食器和爬树架是理想选择。它们喜欢水，浅水喷泉或监督下的洗澡能带来乐趣。定期修剪指甲、清洁耳朵和口腔卫生必不可少。每年带猫去兽医处接种疫苗、驱虫和健康检查，可确保其长寿健康（12–17年）。

training.en: Turkish Vans are highly intelligent and trainable, responding well to positive reinforcement methods such as treats, praise, and clicker training. They can learn tricks like sit, high-five, and fetch, and many enjoy walking on a harness if introduced gradually. Start training early, using short, fun sessions (5–10 minutes) to maintain their interest. Because they are independent, patience is key—never use punishment. Redirect unwanted behaviors (e.g., jumping on counters) by offering appropriate alternatives like cat trees. Their problem-solving skills make puzzle toys excellent for mental stimulation. Consistency and gentle encouragement will build trust and a strong bond.
training.zh: 土耳其梵猫非常聪明且易于训练，对正面强化方法（如零食、赞美和响片训练）反应良好。它们能学会坐下、击掌和衔回等技巧，许多猫在逐步适应后也喜欢穿胸背带散步。训练应尽早开始，每次5–10分钟，保持趣味性以维持其兴趣。由于梵猫性格独立，耐心至关重要——切勿惩罚。通过提供猫爬架等合适替代品，可以纠正跳上柜台等不当行为。它们善于解决问题，益智玩具能提供极好的脑力刺激。一致性和温和的鼓励将建立信任和牢固的纽带。

diet.en: The Turkish Van requires a high-quality, protein-rich diet to support its active lifestyle. Choose commercial cat food (wet or dry) with real meat as the first ingredient, avoiding fillers like corn and soy. A combination of wet and dry food helps maintain hydration and dental health. Adult Vans typically need two measured meals per day; portion sizes depend on age, weight, and activity level—consult your vet for exact amounts. Avoid overfeeding, as this breed can gain weight if sedentary. Fresh water should always be available; a pet fountain encourages drinking. Treats should be limited to 10% of daily calories. Omega-3 fatty acids (from fish oil) can support coat health.
diet.zh: 土耳其梵猫需要高质量、富含蛋白质的饮食以支持其活跃的生活方式。选择以真肉为首要成分的商业猫粮（湿粮或干粮），避免玉米和大豆等填充物。湿粮和干粮搭配有助于水分摄入和口腔健康。成年梵猫通常每天分两餐定量喂食；分量取决于年龄、体重和活动水平——请咨询兽医确定精确用量。避免过度喂食，因为这种猫久坐不动时容易发胖。应随时提供新鲜饮水，宠物喷泉可鼓励饮水。零食应限制在每日热量的10%以内。Omega-3脂肪酸（来自鱼油）有助于维护被毛健康。

livingTips.en: The Turkish Van adapts well to various homes but thrives in environments with space to climb and explore. A cat tree, shelves, and window perches are essential. They are not strictly apartment cats—they need room to run and play, so a secure balcony or access to a cat-proofed yard is ideal. They are generally good with children who respect their boundaries, and can get along with cat-friendly dogs if introduced slowly. However, they may be territorial with other cats. Provide multiple litter boxes (one per cat plus one extra) placed in quiet areas. These cats enjoy water, so a shallow dish or fountain is a plus. Keep hazardous items out of reach due to their curiosity.
livingTips.zh: 土耳其梵猫能适应多种家庭环境，但在有攀爬和探索空间的地方最为快乐。猫爬架、搁板和窗台是必备设施。它们并非严格的公寓猫——需要空间奔跑和玩耍，因此安全的阳台或猫防护的庭院是理想选择。梵猫通常能尊重其界限的孩子友好相处，也能在缓慢引入后与对猫友好的狗和睦共处。但它们可能对其他猫有领地意识。应提供多个猫砂盆（猫数量+1），放置在安静区域。由于它们喜欢水，浅水盘或喷泉是加分项。因其好奇心强，请将危险物品置于难以触及之处。
